title: Incorrect results for predicate with TRY_CAST
description:
### What happens?

Hi, here! I found the following queries in DuckDB run inconsistently:



### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE  TABLE  t0(c0 INT , c1 BOOLEAN , PRIMARY KEY(c0));

INSERT INTO t0(c0, c1) VALUES (890608529, false);


SELECT t0.c1 FROM t0; -- 1 row
SELECT t0.c1 FROM t0 WHERE (true AND((TRY_CAST(t0.c0 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0))); 
-- 0 row (should be 1 row)
SELECT (true AND((TRY_CAST(t0.c0 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0))) FROM t0; 
-- true
```

### OS:

Ubuntu 24.04

### DuckDB Version:

DuckDB v1.3.3-dev3679 (Development Version) 090a44964f

### DuckDB Client:

cli

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Qiuyang Mang

### Affiliation:

UC Berkeley

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT, c2 BOOLEAN, PRIMARY KEY(c0));
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 1.5, true);
SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE (CAST(c1 AS DECIMAL(5,2)) < 2.0);
SELECT (CAST(c0 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) IS NOT NULL) FROM t1;
SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE (c1 IS NULL OR (CAST(c0 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0));
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results with TRY_CAST in WHERE clause
